creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253555
added TEST_TARGET too

I want add test target and add lua-lunit to TEST_DEPENDS. The 'make test' fails:
lua54 test/tests-sqlite3.lua lsqlite3
lua54: /usr/local/share/lua/5.4/lunit.lua:49: attempt to call a nil value (global 'module')
stack traceback:
        /usr/local/share/lua/5.4/lunit.lua:49: in main chunk
        [C]: in function 'require'
        test/tests-sqlite3.lua:38: in main chunk
        [C]: in ?
*** Error code 1

Could you please check?
